title: SLSS Frens Adventure
description: The Slightly Less Secret Society Frens Adventure - a modpack with lots of environments to explore, interesting ways of building/automating, cooking and fishing options, and various quality of life improvements.
body:
# Frens Adventure

A modpack that is mostly trying to provide a vanilla+ experience with emphasis on exploration (with a bunch of mods that generate new stuff in biomes and a few dimensions), cozy base building, automation via Create, and quality of life improvements.

### Dedicated Server Config

Running a dedicated server requires removing or disabling these client-only mods:
- cat_jam
- Clear Water
- Mouse Tweaks
- Neko's Enchanted Books
- Oculus

### Licensing & Attribution

Most of the mods included are distributed on modrinth, but some are from Curseforge:

* [Aquaculture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture) by [Shadow](https://www.curseforge.com/members/shadow)
* [Aquaculture Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture-delight) by [nocubeyt](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nocubeyt)
* [Passthrough Signs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/passthrough-signs) by [Girafi](https://www.curseforge.com/members/girafi)
* [Chimes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chimes) by [BlewberryPie](https://www.curseforge.com/members/blewberrypie)
* [Useless Sword](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/useless-sword) by [Furti_Two](https://www.curseforge.com/members/furti_two)
* [Carpet Trapdoors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/carpet-trapdoors) by [modsbyblast](https://www.curseforge.com/members/modsbyblast)
* [Camp Chair](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/camp-chair) by [dmitrylovin](https://www.curseforge.com/members/dmitrylovin)
* [Path Under Gates](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/path-under-gates) by [cyberslas](https://www.curseforge.com/members/cyberslas)
* [Fairy Lights](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fairy-lights) by [pau101](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pau101)
* [Map Atlases \[Forge\]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/map-atlases-forge) by [MehVahdJukaar](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mehvahdjukaar)
